name: Maryland Cream of Crab Soup - Carrol's Creek
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped fresh chives or Green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion, cloves, and bay leaf; sauté until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
3. Sprinkle with flour and stir for 1 minute.
4. Gradually whisk in milk and cream. Add nutmeg and 1/8 teaspoon cayenne pepper.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer until slightly thickened, about 15 minutes.
6. Strain the soup into a bowl, pressing on solids to release liquid. Return the liquid to the saucepan.
7. Add crabmeat, clam juice, and sherry; simmer until thickened, about 15 minutes (do not boil).
8. Season with additional cayenne pepper, if desired, and salt and pepper.
(Make ahead: Can be made 1 day ahead. Chill. Rewarm over low heat.)
Serve soup in bowls and garnish with chives.
